title: salix × ustroniensis
intro: Salix × ustroniensis is a hybrid willow plant, resulting from the cross between Salix purpurea and Salix × sepulcralis, and is commonly known as the Ustron willow. The bark and leaves of the Salix × ustroniensis plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and improve cardiovascular health. Salix × ustroniensis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
